title: The Witness
subtitle: Chapter 01 · The First Fractures
introduction: Inside the instrument itself, light moves through the stroma and returns the observer's gaze.
description: Inside the instrument itself, light moves through the stroma and returns the observer's gaze.
observation: The field breathes. Fine strands of color gather around an aperture that is both lens and reflection.
reconstruction: Carry the stroma, the returning light, and the aperture at the center of the field.
attunements: The stroma carries the light rather than containing it.
The reflection answers the observer's movement.
The aperture is an instrument of attention.
revelation: The instrument and the observer looked into each other and discovered they were holding the same light.

anomaly_definition.misstep_text: Not there. Watch the center lens, not the borders.
anomaly_definition.success_text: Attention loop identified. The reflection moves before the observer.

evidence_nodes.relevance: The strands glow with returning light.
The light is blue-shifted, carrying future focus.
The lens centers around an empty point of origin.
